problem: Why does quantum superposition collapse — can decoherence be prevented at scale?
hypothesis: If Bose-Einstein condensate at higher temperature is applied to prevented, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Calorimetric measurement with 4 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
